examples: Protein and carbohydrate have 4 calories per gram, per unit weight.
Gram for gram the fat provides a lot more punch in terms of calories than protein or carbohydrate.
The industry, stung by the current popularity of the Atkins low-carbohydrate diet, has begun to respond.
And not every carbon-dioxide molecule that diffuses into a leaf gets incorporated into a carbohydrate.
At the same time, a new market is opening up for low-carbohydrate snacks, foods and beverages.
